title: Reshiram Mace
description: This Resource pack Changes the mace into a inspired pokemon "Reshiram"!
body:
This Resource pack changes the mace from the normal looking heavy core to a white and red pink-ish colored mace that is inspired by the pokemon Reshiram.

Made this texture cuz its my favourite pokemon lol

I will be make a discord server for suggestions soon:)

If you downloaded thanks for the support:D
